variants: Wiktor Nowacki, a creative inventor, was born in Pinecairn Meadows and now makes his home in Roseglade Station. He is recognized for his groundbreaking invention, the Heliotrope Signal Lens, which earned him the esteemed Garnet Shard Token. In addition to his inventive pursuits, Wiktor is an active member of the Verdant Drift Crafters, a society dedicated to advancing skills in crafting. His work has had a profound effect on the community as he inspires fellow artisans with his knowledge and creativity, embodying the spirit of innovation.

His contributions continue to elevate the standard of craftsmanship in the region.
